00009 #ifndef FILE_H
00010 #define FILE_H
00011 
00012 #include <types.h>
00013 #include <uio.h>
00014 #include <vfs.h>
00015 
00016 #define MAX_FD 255      /* Max number of file descriptors for a thread */
00017 
00018 bool con_attached;
00019 
00020 /* File table entry */
00021 /* Is a simple file control block */
00022 struct file {
00023 
00024         struct vnode* vfs_node;         /* Node being referenced */
00025         unsigned int offset;            /* Offset within node */
00026         //struct uio* location;
00027         bool writeable;
00028         bool readable;
00029 };
00030 
00031 void init_file_table(struct thread* thread);
00032 void set_std_fd(struct thread* thread);
00033 
00034 #endif
